Custom Advertising Yard Signs for Business Promotion & Outdoor Display

Durable Corrugated Plastic Advertising Yard Signs for All-Weather Use

PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Size (H x W) Quantity Design Method Finishing Options Installation Stakes PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Corrugated Plastic Material for Long-Lasting Outdoor Advertising Yard Signs

Custom advertising yard signs are digitally printed in full color on durable 4mm white corrugated plastic material. This lightweight yet sturdy material features hollow flutes running horizontally, similar to cardboard construction, providing excellent durability for outdoor business advertising, promotional displays, and event signage.

The corrugated plastic construction is completely waterproof and can accommodate both single-sided and double-sided printing, making these yard signs ideal for extended outdoor use. Whether you're promoting a business sale, advertising services, or displaying promotional messages, these signs maintain their professional appearance in all weather conditions.

Key Features:

  • 4mm corrugated plastic material for durability
  • Full CMYK color digital printing
  • Waterproof and weather-resistant
  • Lightweight for easy installation
  • Available in single or double-sided options
  • Professional finishing with 1/2" white margin or full bleed

Please note: All corrugated plastic yard signs are trimmed 1/8" on each side during finishing (example: an 18" x 24" sign will measure 17.75" x 23.75"). For precision applications, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300.

Automatic Scoring for Large Signs:

All advertising yard signs over 32" x 48" or with combined dimensions exceeding 81 inches are automatically scored and folded for shipping. Scoring involves cutting through the top layer without penetrating the entire material, allowing the sign to fold for optimal shipping while maintaining structural integrity upon installation.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Corrugated Plastic Material for Long-Lasting Outdoor Advertising Yard Signs

Advertising yard signs are manufactured using premium 4mm white corrugated plastic, specifically engineered for outdoor advertising applications. This material provides the perfect balance of durability, lightweight handling, and professional appearance for business promotional displays.

Material Specifications:

  • Thickness: 4mm corrugated plastic
  • Construction: Hollow flute design for strength and lightness
  • Color: White base material for vibrant print reproduction
  • Weather Resistance: 100% waterproof and UV-resistant
  • Print Capability: Single or double-sided full color printing

Durability Features:

  • Resistant to rain, snow, and moisture
  • Maintains color vibrancy in direct sunlight
  • Flexible yet rigid for outdoor installation
  • Temperature stable in various climate conditions
  • Lightweight design reduces wind stress on stakes

The corrugated plastic construction makes these signs ideal for temporary and semi-permanent outdoor advertising, providing professional results that withstand the elements while remaining cost-effective for promotional campaigns.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Professional Advertising Yard Sign Display

Professional finishing options ensure your advertising yard signs deliver maximum visual impact and durability for outdoor business promotion and advertising campaigns.

Print Finishing Options:

  • White Margin: 1/2" clean white border around your design
  • Full Bleed: Ink extends completely to the edge of the sign
  • Single-Sided: High-resolution printing on front face
  • Double-Sided: Full color printing on both sides for maximum visibility

Installation Hardware Available:

  • H Stakes: Available for 10"x15", 10"x24", and 10"x30" signs
  • Beefy Stakes: Heavy-duty option for larger signs and windy conditions
  • Zip Ties: 12" black and 36" white options for fence mounting
  • Wire Stakes: Professional-grade installation hardware

Large Sign Scoring:

Signs exceeding 32" x 48" or with combined dimensions over 81" automatically receive scoring for shipping efficiency. Scoring cuts through the top layer only, allowing controlled folding without compromising sign integrity during installation.

For applications requiring flat shipping without scoring, oversized flat shipping options are available. Contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 for specialized finishing requirements.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Advertising Yard Sign Production & Turnaround Times

Flexible production scheduling allows you to select the turnaround time that best fits your advertising campaign timeline and budget requirements.

1 Business Day Priority:

  • Fastest available turnaround for urgent advertising needs
  • Perfect for time-sensitive promotional campaigns
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Emergency same-day service available in select cases

2 Business Days Express:

  • Ideal balance of speed and cost efficiency
  • Excellent for planned promotional events and sales
  • Allows additional time for quality control review

3 Business Days Standard:

  • Most popular production option
  • No additional rush charges
  • Suitable for most advertising campaigns and business promotions

5 Business Days Saver:

  • Cost-effective option for advance planning
  • Best value for large quantity orders
  • Perfect for ongoing advertising campaigns

Production Notes:

  • Turnaround begins when file upload is complete
  • Proof requests pause production until approval is received
  • Prepress review may extend timeline if artwork requires adjustment
  • Production time excludes shipping duration to final destination

Advertising Yard Sign Payment & Ordering Options

Convenient payment processing ensures secure transactions for your custom advertising yard sign orders, with multiple payment methods available to accommodate business and personal purchasing needs.

Accepted Payment Methods:

  • Credit Cards: Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover
  • Business Checks: Must be received before production begins
  • Electronic Payments: Secure online processing for immediate approval

Payment Processing:

  • Credit cards are charged only after order approval
  • All orders require payment before production starts
  • Check payments must clear before manufacturing begins
  • Secure payment processing protects customer information

Order Approval Process:

  • Review order details and artwork before payment processing
  • Optional proof review available for quality assurance
  • Customer approval required before production begins
  • Order modifications possible before final approval

For check payment procedures and business account setup, contact customer service at (320) 391-5300. Detailed check payment guidelines are available on our business blog for corporate purchasing departments.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Advertising Yard Sign Delivery

Reliable shipping ensures your custom advertising yard signs arrive safely and on schedule for your promotional campaigns and business advertising needs.

Standard Shipping Methods:

  • Standard (3-5 Business Days): Most economical ground shipping
  • Three Day Service: Guaranteed 3 business day delivery
  • Two Day Service: Express shipping for time-sensitive campaigns
  • Overnight Service: Next business day delivery available
  • UPS Overnight AM: Morning delivery for critical deadlines

Shipping Coverage:

  • 1-3 day ground delivery to 90% of the United States
  • Tracking numbers provided for all shipments
  • Production from Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities for optimal delivery
  • Economy shipping available for cost-conscious orders

Large Order Considerations:

  • Additional charges may apply to oversized yard sign orders
  • Automatic scoring and folding for signs over 32" x 48"
  • Flat shipping available for specialty applications
  • International shipping requires customer-provided labels and customs documentation

Shipping Protection:

  • Damaged goods must be returned for replacement processing
  • Lost packages replaced after carrier confirmation (7-10 business days)
  • Natural disaster delays do not qualify for shipping refunds
  • Carrier terms apply once shipment leaves our facility

For shipping questions or special delivery requirements, contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 before placing your advertising yard sign order.

Business & Promotional Uses for Custom Advertising Yard Signs

Advertising yard signs provide versatile promotional solutions for businesses, organizations, and events, delivering cost-effective visibility in high-traffic areas and strategic locations.

Business Advertising Applications:

  • Retail store sales and promotional announcements
  • Service business location and contact information
  • Restaurant specials and grand opening events
  • Professional services advertising and branding
  • Seasonal business promotions and holiday sales

Real Estate & Property Marketing:

  • For sale and for rent property advertising
  • Open house event promotion and wayfinding
  • Commercial property leasing and availability
  • Real estate agent contact information display
  • Property development and construction announcements

Event & Campaign Promotion:

  • Political campaign advertising and candidate promotion
  • Community event announcements and directions
  • Fundraising campaign visibility and support
  • School and sports team promotional displays
  • Non-profit organization awareness campaigns

Temporary Advertising Solutions:

  • Construction site information and safety notices
  • Parking and directional signage for events
  • Yard sale and garage sale promotion
  • Graduation and celebration announcements
  • Business relocation and contact updates

The lightweight, weather-resistant construction makes advertising yard signs ideal for both short-term promotional campaigns and extended outdoor advertising applications.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Advertising Yard Sign Artwork Requirements for Professional Printing

Proper artwork preparation ensures optimal print quality and professional results for your custom advertising yard signs, maximizing visual impact and readability.

Preferred File Formats:

  • EPS Files: Vector format converted to outlines (best quality)
  • High-Resolution PDF: Professional print-ready documents
  • TIFF Files: High-resolution raster images (300 DPI minimum)
  • JPEG Files: High-resolution photos and graphics

Resolution Requirements:

  • 300 DPI minimum for optimal print clarity
  • Large format files should maintain resolution quality
  • Vector artwork preferred for text and logo elements
  • Color images should use CMYK color mode

Professional Design Services:

  • Expert graphic designers available for custom artwork creation
  • File quality assessment and optimization included
  • Template customization for quick design solutions
  • Brand consistency guidance for business advertising

Proofing Options:

  • Digital Proofs: Email review of artwork and order details
  • Color Match Proofs: Physical color verification for critical projects
  • Order Proofs: Complete order summary with billing and shipping information
  • Approval Required: Production begins only after customer approval

File Upload Guidelines:

  • 60 MB maximum file size for standard uploads
  • Contact customer service for larger files requiring special handling
  • Multiple file formats accepted for convenience
  • Professional design consultation available for complex projects

For artwork questions or design assistance, our professional graphic design team is available to ensure your advertising yard signs achieve maximum promotional impact.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions

What are advertising yard signs made from?

Advertising yard signs are manufactured using durable 4mm corrugated plastic material. This lightweight yet sturdy material features a hollow flute construction similar to cardboard but is completely waterproof and weather-resistant, making it ideal for outdoor advertising applications.

Are these yard signs waterproof for outdoor use?

Yes, advertising yard signs are completely waterproof and designed for extended outdoor use. The corrugated plastic material and digital printing process create signs that resist rain, snow, and moisture while maintaining vibrant colors and professional appearance throughout your advertising campaign.

Can I order double-sided advertising yard signs?

Absolutely! We offer both single-sided and double-sided printing options for advertising yard signs. Double-sided signs provide maximum visibility from multiple directions, making them particularly effective for high-traffic areas and intersection placement.

How long do advertising yard signs last outdoors?

Corrugated plastic advertising yard signs are designed for extended outdoor use and typically maintain their appearance for several months to over a year, depending on weather conditions and sun exposure. The UV-resistant inks and waterproof material ensure long-lasting promotional impact.

What installation options are available for advertising yard signs?

We offer various installation hardware including H-stakes for standard applications, heavy-duty "beefy stakes" for windy conditions, and zip ties for fence mounting. Stakes are available in multiple sizes to accommodate different sign dimensions and installation requirements.

Can you help design my advertising yard sign?

Yes! We offer professional graphic design services, hundreds of customizable templates, and accept your own print-ready artwork. Our design team can help create effective advertising yard signs that align with your branding and promotional objectives.

What sizes are available for advertising yard signs?

Standard sizes range from 12" x 12" up to 48" x 96", with custom sizing options available. Signs larger than 32" x 48" are automatically scored and folded for shipping, or flat shipping can be arranged for specific applications.

How quickly can you produce advertising yard signs?

Production times range from 1 to 5 business days, depending on your timeline and budget needs. Priority 1-day service is available for urgent advertising campaigns, while 5-day saver options provide the best value for advance planning.
